# Frontend Path Instructions

- Apply this instruction set to the `frontend` runtime role.
- Preserve `ListPage`, `DetailPage`, `RegistrationPage`, `ModifyPage`, `Shared`, and `Api` patterns.
- Keep route, type, i18n, API normalization, and search state changes aligned.
- Read `docs/ai/services/frontend.md` before structural UI changes.
- If the repository family is `web-app`, `pwa`, or `mockup-local`, combine this with the matching family instruction.
